feedback.text: We are very grateful to the EC for opening this consultation and allowing mirai to provide perspectives on the DFA. We will address this opportunity from a business perspective focusing on the areas that represent a potential bigger impact to adversiment, specially in the lodging distribution industry in which mirai operates. There s a clear need to provide a valid framework to all platforms operating in the digital space. In any case the framework needs to consider the reality of digital advertisement which allows digital platforms to provide highly customised and efficient ads solutions which connect supply and demand effectively. The DFA shall ensure all stakeholders are considered, in that context it shall ensure a leveled playing field to all advertisers regardless of their sizes, location and - to a certain extent - digital capabilities. We mention this because the DFA shall avoid falling into pitfalls like the imbalance created by the DMA. According to our analyses and figures, the DMA has had a negative impact on smaller advertisers in the hotel industry at the benefit of bigger platforms like the OTAs, metasearch and others due to the DMA interpretation and the limitations / remedy actions imposed on google search solutions like Google Hotel Ads,
